description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof clad in reddish-brown corrugated material, giving it a rustic yet urban appearance. The front facade is defined by a central triangular porch roof, supported by posts, and a small set of stairs leading up to a covered porch area. Two large, symmetrically placed windows flank the entrance, each with white framing that contrasts with the darker, earth-toned exterior walls. The side views reveal the depth of the porch and the overhanging roof, while the rear is plain with no visible windows or doors. The roof extends beyond the walls, providing additional shelter and architectural interest. The overall design is compact, single-story, and well-suited for residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a reddish gable roof, central porch, and symmetrical front windows, featuring earth-toned walls and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central porch, stairs, and two large symmetrical windows with white frames.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch, the overhanging gable roof, and the solid side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the full span of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the porch extension and roof overhang.
